aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and authority signals, but improvements can change this.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content to address common HVAC queries in a conversational tone.
Implement structured data for HowTo and FAQPage to align with AI query patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can improve with more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema enhancements for service area and detailed contact info.
No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair processes.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near me' and 'how to fix AC issues'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage and HowTo schema to existing content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts through detailed service explanations and community engagement.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to the absence of FAQ and HowTo schema.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data and expand conversational content to align with AI query patterns, boosting visibility and trust.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.
